final.title: Success
final.description: You've successfully completed all the steps.
final.description_sharing: Your wallet has been created to receive your **{{ productName }}** reward for sharing. To find your wallet, go to [wallet.frak.id](https://wallet.frak.id).
final.description_reward: Check your earnings at any time on [wallet.frak.id](https://wallet.frak.id). You too can share with your friends, all your shares that lead to clicks, registrations or purchases generate new earnings!

login.description: Login to your Frak account to get the best experience on **{{ productName }}**
login.description_sharing: {{ productName }} pays you directly on your **wallet** for the value you create if your shares lead to actions such as clicks, registrations or purchases.
login.description_reward: {{ productName }} pays you directly into your **wallets** for the value you create through actions on this site, such as clicks, registrations or purchases.
login.secondaryAction: Use a QR code to connect
login.title: Connection

sendTransaction.description: To complete, authorize this transaction in your wallet. This ensures secure processing.
sendTransaction.title: Transaction

siweAuthenticate.description: Please authenticate with your wallet to proceed securely. Your signature confirms your identity.
siweAuthenticate.title: Authentication

login.text: Create your wallet and receive up to **{{ estimatedReward }}** per referred friend
login.text_referred:
Welcome! Receive up to **{{ estimatedReward }}** in case of purchase on the site.

Create your wallet in 1 click

onboarding.share: 🚀 Let's go! Share this product and receive your rewards directly.
onboarding.share_referred: 🚀 Share your turn to win more!

reward.title: Share with your friends
reward.tagline: You earn a reward every time a friend makes a purchase through your link.

steps.1: Share in 1 click. A personal link is automatically generated with each share.
steps.2: Earn on every purchase. Every order placed through your link earns you cash.
steps.3: Collect your earnings in the app. Install FRAK to collect your earnings.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Anyone can become an ambassador by sharing products through their unique link.
faq.a2: Your earnings depend on the brand's reward program and the number of purchases made through your link.
faq.a3: Your earnings are credited as soon as a purchase is confirmed through your sharing link.
faq.a4: Yes, everyone can create their own sharing link and become an ambassador too.
faq.a5: Frak enables brands to reward their community for word-of-mouth, in a transparent and decentralized way.

confirmation.title:
Thank you for sharing!
Don't miss out on your {{ estimatedReward }}.
confirmation.subtitle: Install the Frak app, official partner of {{ productName }}, and track your earnings in real time.
confirmation.cardPopupDescription: A purchase was made through your link. {{ estimatedReward }} has been transferred to your wallet.

wallet.title: Your wallet secured in 10 seconds
wallet.description: No email, no password, no form. Simple, fast and secure.

notify.title: Get notified as soon as you earn
notify.description: Receive a notification when a purchase is made thanks to you.

cashout.title: Cash out whenever you want
cashout.description: Transfer your earnings directly to your bank account in 3 clicks.
